title: Senior Backend Engineer (Node.js)
jd_text:
About Us:
StratoWave Technologies is a leading provider of cloud-based logistics solutions, committed to transforming supply chain management through innovative backend systems. We pride ourselves on fostering a collaborative and dynamic environment where bold ideas thrive.

The Role:
We are seeking a Senior Backend Engineer skilled in Node.js to join our growing engineering team. You will be responsible for designing and implementing high-performance APIs and microservices that power our logistics platform. Your focus will be on building scalable backend solutions using Node.js and Express, integrating with PostgreSQL and Redis for data management and caching.

Responsibilities include:
- Developing RESTful APIs and backend services
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define system architecture
- Maintaining and improving existing codebases
- Optimizing database queries and system performance
- Implementing containerization with Docker and deploying to AWS environments

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience in backend development with a strong focus on Node.js
- Proficiency with Express framework
- Experience with relational databases, preferably PostgreSQL
- Familiarity with Redis or other caching technologies
- Good understanding of containerization (Docker) and cloud deployment (AWS)
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Salary & Benefits:
- £65,000 - £80,000 per annum
- Flexible working hours and remote work options
- Private healthcare and pension plan
- Annual training budget and conference attendance

How to Apply:
Please submit your CV and a cover letter detailing your relevant experience to careers@stratowave.co.uk with the subject line 'Senior Backend Engineer Application'.

title: Junior Node.js Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
BrightPath Solutions is a fast-growing fintech startup dedicated to creating seamless payment processing platforms for small businesses. We believe in empowering our team with the latest backend tools and a supportive environment.

The Role:
We are looking for a Junior Node.js Developer to join our backend team. This is an excellent opportunity for someone with foundational experience to grow their skills working alongside senior engineers. You will assist in developing backend services, integrating with MongoDB databases, and supporting API endpoints.

Key Responsibilities:
- Developing and maintaining backend services using Node.js
- Writing clean, testable code under guidance
- Supporting database integration with MongoDB
- Collaborating with other developers and QA teams
- Participating in code reviews and team meetings

Requirements:
- 1-2 years experience in backend development with Node.js
- Basic understanding of Express framework
- Exposure to MongoDB or similar NoSQL databases
- Good communication skills and willingness to learn

Salary & Benefits:
- £28,000 - £32,000 per annum
- Mentorship and structured onboarding
- Flexible working hours
- Regular team social events

How to Apply:
Send your CV and a brief statement about why you want to join BrightPath Solutions to hr@brightpath.com with the subject 'Junior Node.js Developer'.

title: Lead Node.js Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
NexGen Cloud Services provides cloud infrastructure solutions to enterprise clients worldwide. Our mission is to build robust, scalable backend systems that support critical business operations.

The Role:
As Lead Node.js Developer, you will oversee backend development projects, mentor engineers, and help define best practices. Your expertise in Node.js and experience with PostgreSQL and Docker will be invaluable in delivering top-tier backend platforms.

Responsibilities:
- Lead the design and implementation of backend microservices using Node.js
- Ensure code quality through reviews and testing standards
- Manage deployment pipelines using Docker and AWS
- Collaborate with product managers to align technical solutions with business needs
- Mentor junior and mid-level engineers

Requirements:
- 7+ years backend development experience, with at least 4 years in Node.js
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL and relational data modeling
- Proficient in containerization (Docker) and cloud services (AWS)
- Leadership experience and excellent communication skills
- Familiarity with Redis or similar caching systems

Salary & Benefits:
- £85,000 - £95,000 per annum
- Generous pension scheme
- 25 days paid leave plus bank holidays
- Opportunities for professional development

How to Apply:
Please email your CV and leadership experience summary to careers@nexgencloud.co.uk quoting 'Lead Node.js Developer'.

title: Backend Developer - Node.js
jd_text:
About Us:
EcoFleet Ltd is a green-tech company focused on developing smart fleet management solutions that reduce environmental impact. We leverage efficient backend systems to enable real-time vehicle tracking and analytics.

The Role:
We are searching for a Backend Developer experienced in Node.js to join our team. You will contribute to building scalable APIs and services integrated with PostgreSQL databases and real-time Redis caching.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and implement backend services using Node.js and Express
- Work with PostgreSQL for data storage and optimize queries
- Integrate Redis for caching and real-time data processing
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver new features
- Participate in code reviews and unit testing

Requirements:
- 3+ years of backend development with Node.js
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL
- Familiarity with Redis or similar caching systems
- Experience with Docker and AWS is a plus
- Good communication skills and a proactive attitude

Salary & Benefits:
- £45,000 - £55,000 per annum
- Flexible working hours
- Hybrid remote work
- Cycle to work scheme and wellness initiatives

How to Apply:
To apply, please send your CV and a cover letter to jobs@ecofleet.co.uk with the subject 'Backend Developer Application'.

title: Mid-Level Node.js API Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
DataPulse Analytics delivers high-throughput data processing pipelines for the financial sector. Our backend services handle large volumes of transactional data with strict performance requirements.

The Role:
We are hiring a Mid-Level Node.js API Developer to build and maintain scalable RESTful APIs. You will work closely with data engineers and QA to ensure robustness and reliability.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain REST APIs using Node.js and Express
- Interface with PostgreSQL databases and optimize query performance
- Implement caching strategies with Redis
- Write unit and integration tests
- Participate in sprint planning and code reviews

Requirements:
- 3-5 years backend development experience, primarily with Node.js
- Experience with Express and PostgreSQL
- Knowledge of Redis caching
- Familiarity with Docker containers and AWS deployment
- Strong analytical and communication skills

Salary & Benefits:
- £50,000 - £60,000 per annum
- 25 days holiday plus bank holidays
- Private health insurance
- Annual bonus and career development support

How to Apply:
Submit your CV and portfolio link to recruitment@datapulseanalytics.com with the subject 'Mid-Level Node.js API Developer'.

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js) - Remote
jd_text:
About Us:
CloudNest Solutions offers SaaS platforms for online education providers. We build highly scalable backend services supporting thousands of concurrent users worldwide.

The Role:
We are looking for a Backend Engineer experienced in Node.js to join our fully remote team. You will develop backend components, integrate with MongoDB, and help implement containerized deployment workflows.

Key Responsibilities:
- Build scalable backend APIs using Node.js and Express
- Manage data storage using MongoDB
- Utilize Docker for containerization and support CI/CD pipelines
- Collaborate with a distributed team through agile methodologies

Requirements:
- 3+ years backend development experience with Node.js
- Experience with NoSQL databases, preferably MongoDB
- Familiarity with Docker and Git workflows
- Ability to work independently and communicate effectively remotely

Salary & Benefits:
- £45,000 - £55,000 per annum
- Fully remote working with flexible hours
- Annual learning budget
- Equipment allowance

How to Apply:
Please send your CV and a brief introduction to hiring@cloudnest.io with the subject 'Remote Backend Engineer Application'.

title: Senior Node.js Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
FinGuard Cybersecurity provides cutting-edge backend solutions for financial institutions to safeguard their data and transactions. Our backend systems demand high availability and security.

The Role:
We require a Senior Node.js Developer to architect and implement secure backend services. Your role will include working with PostgreSQL databases, implementing caching with Redis, and managing deployments using Docker and AWS.

Responsibilities:
- Develop secure and scalable backend APIs using Node.js
- Collaborate with security teams to ensure application hardening
- Optimize database interactions in PostgreSQL
- Manage containerized deployments and cloud infrastructure

Requirements:
- 5+ years of backend development experience in Node.js
- Strong PostgreSQL and Redis knowledge
- Experience with Docker and AWS
- Understanding of security best practices
- Excellent communication skills

Salary & Benefits:
- £70,000 - £80,000 per annum
- Private healthcare and wellness programs
- Flexible working and remote days
- Annual performance bonus

How to Apply:
Interested candidates should email their CV and security-related project experience to careers@finguardcyber.co.uk.

title: API Developer - Node.js

Key Responsibilities:

- Integrate with MongoDB databases

- Collaborate in Agile teams and participate in code reviews

- Strong problem-solving skills

- Training opportunities
- Pension scheme

Please forward your CV and a short cover letter to hr@greenbyteenergy.co.uk quoting 'API Developer Role'.
